title: Vegapunk’s Message Begins
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Kizaru, Atlas, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Vegapunk as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll take 10 minutes to brew the coffee...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I won't get a sip in!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see! The probability of interference in this time frame is exceedingly low.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have a few more of the most popular things you have ever seen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: MORE IMPORTANTLY, HAS HE LOST HIS HEAD?!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: WHAT IS VEGAPUNK UP TO NOW!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that's the Dr. Vegas everyone's always talking about?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's quite the man to do this in the middle of a crisis!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I think I'll be dead soon.

dialogue.speaker: Atlas
dialogue.text: Looks like my punches don't damage you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not till I'm sure my friends have escaped!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since you keep getting better no matter what!!!

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
